ground_truth.title: Online Coding Bootcamp | Emory University
ground_truth.main_content: Emory Coding Bootcamp will help you launch a lucrative tech career in an accelerated time frame in Atlanta and beyond. This 12-week program covers full stack web development including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Students receive hands-on training to build a portfolio of real-world projects. Tuition is $13,995 with various payment options available.
with: Emory Coding Bootcamp will help you launch a lucrative tech career in an accelerated time frame in Atlanta and beyond.
This 12-week coding bootcamp is designed to help students develop the skills and knowledge needed to become a full stack web developer.
Our curriculum covers a range of in-demand programming languages and technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, React, and databases.
Students will receive hands-on training and work on real-world projects to build a professional portfolio.
Tuition is $13,995 and various payment options are available including upfront, monthly, and ISA.
